title: Exploratory Analysis for Binary & Categorical Data
description: A flowchart outlining the key steps and methods for exploring binary and categorical variables in a dataset.
relationships: Start with a Raw Dataset to Identify Categorical Variables, then create Frequency Tables and visualize them with Bar Charts or Pie Charts. For relationships between two variables, perform Cross-Tabulation and visualize it with a Mosaic Plot. Statistically test the association with a Chi-Square Test to reach Summary Insights.
